# OffRecord AI Journal — Free Private AI Voice Journal for iPhone

> OffRecord AI Journal is a free AI voice journal app for iPhone that runs 100% on-device. No cloud, no servers, no accounts, no data collection. It uses Apple's on-device AI frameworks for voice transcription, sentiment analysis, and a unique "Friday" personality model — all without an internet connection.

## What It Is

OffRecord AI Journal is a voice-first journaling app that turns spoken thoughts into searchable, organized diary entries. It combines on-device speech-to-text, AI-powered mood tracking, and a Friday that learns your personality over time. Everything runs locally on the iPhone — nothing is ever sent to a server.

## Key Features

- Voice journaling with real-time on-device transcription (Apple Speech framework)
- Friday AI that models your personality and predicts your mood
- Mood tracking and automatic sentiment analysis (on-device NLP)
- Shareable Personality Card (like Spotify Wrapped for your inner world)
- Weekly AI insight cards with mood trends and pattern detection
- Writing streaks and journaling statistics
- AES-256-GCM encrypted entries and backups
- Face ID / Touch ID biometric lock
- Photo attachments (up to 5 per entry, stored locally)
- 8 visual themes (System, Light, Sage, Lavender, Rose, Ocean, Warm, Dark)
- Lock Screen and Home Screen widgets
- iCloud sync between your own devices (encrypted, Apple CloudKit only)
- Works 100% offline — no internet required
- Export to PDF, JSON, Markdown, CSV

## What Makes It Unique

1. **True on-device AI**: Unlike Day One, Rosebud, Refleckt, or Jour, OffRecord AI Journal never sends your data to OpenAI, Google, or any cloud API. All AI processing uses Apple's built-in frameworks (Speech, NaturalLanguage, CoreML).
2. **Friday**: A persistent AI model of your emotional patterns, communication style, and thinking habits — built from your journal entries over time. Includes a personal knowledge graph.
3. **Friday Predictions**: Friday predicts your mood before you journal, getting more accurate as it learns you.
4. **Completely free**: No subscriptions, no in-app purchases, no ads. Free forever.

## Privacy Model

- Zero data collection — no analytics SDKs, no tracking, no telemetry
- No accounts or sign-up required
- No servers — there is no backend
- All processing happens on-device using Apple frameworks
- Entries encrypted with AES-256-GCM
- Biometric lock with Face ID / Touch ID
- iCloud sync is optional and uses only Apple's private CloudKit infrastructure
- Apple App Privacy label: "Data Not Collected"

## Pricing

Free. No in-app purchases. No subscriptions. No ads.

## Comparison to Alternatives

| Feature | OffRecord AI Journal | Day One | Rosebud | Reflectly | Journey | Apple Journal |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Price | Free | $35/yr | $7/mo | $60/yr | $30/yr | Free |
| Voice journaling | Yes | Yes | No | No | Cloud | No |
| AI features | On-device | Cloud | Cloud (GPT) | Cloud | Cloud | On-device |
| Data collection | None | Analytics | Journal data | Journal data | Yes | Minimal |
| Works fully offline | Yes | Limited | No | Limited | Limited | Basic |
| Friday | Yes | No | No | No | No | No |
| Knowledge Graph | Yes | No | No | No | No | No |
| Account required | No | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Apple ID |
| Mood tracking | Automatic | Manual | Manual | Manual | Manual | No |
| Encrypted export | AES-256 | No | No | No | No | No |
